name: Concia of Zucchini
recipeIngredient: 6 medium clove garlic, peeled and finely minced
2 bunches fresh basil chiffonade, to yield 1 C
1 porcelain or glass deep dish pie pan
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim the ends of both green and yellow zucchini. Slice them lengthwise into pieces that are 1/4-inch thick.
2. Heat olive oil in a deep frying pan until it just begins to smoke.
3. Cook 5-6 pieces of zucchini at a time, golden brown, turning once, for about 3-4 minutes. Remove and drain on paper towels. Repeat with remaining zucchini until finished.
4. In a mixing bowl, lightly stir together garlic, basil, salt, and pepper until well mixed.
5. Place several pieces of zucchini at the bottom of the pie dish to cover the base.
6. Sprinkle zucchini with 1-1/2 tablespoons of the herb mixture as evenly as possible.
7. Spritz with 1 tablespoon of red wine vinegar.
8. Continue layering zucchini and herb mixture until all zucchini is used, then cover with plastic wrap.
9. Refrigerate for 2 hours before serving.
10. To serve, remove pieces by hand and place over freshly grilled bread.
Yield: 4 servings
